gate.connecting: Establishing secure connection to Nostr network...

creator.title: Launch Your Airline
creator.subtitle: Set up your home airport, name your airline, and pick your colors. You'll be flying in under a minute.
creator.homeHubDesc: This is where your airline will be based. It determines your starting region and costs.
creator.usingLocation: We're using your location to suggest a nearby airport.
creator.identityDesc: Choose a name, a short code, and an optional callsign. Other players will see these on the map and leaderboards.
creator.nameHint: Keep it short, memorable, and easy to spot on the map.
creator.icaoHint: A unique 3-letter shortcode shown on routes and aircraft tails.
creator.icaoConflict: ICAO code "{{code}}" is already in use.
creator.liveryDesc: These two colors will appear on your aircraft and brand.
creator.exportKeyWarning: Export your recovery key before launch so this airline stays yours if you lose this browser.

guest.title: Start your airline
guest.subtitle: No account, no download, no crypto knowledge needed. Your progress is saved automatically.
guest.playFree: Play for free — no sign-up required
guest.haveNostrAccount: I already have a Nostr account →

security.notBackedUp: Your account isn't backed up yet — if you lose this browser/tab, your airline is gone.
security.keyBrowserOnly: Your account key is saved only in this browser. Back it up so you can play from anywhere:

backup.noKeyFound: No local recovery key was found on this device.
backup.clipboardUnavailable: Clipboard access is unavailable in this browser context.
backup.keyCopiedDesc: Store it somewhere only you can access.
backup.keyDownloadedDesc: Move it to a password manager or another safe place.
backup.keyExplainer: Your secret key starts with nsec1… — treat it like a password. ACARS stores it locally on this device and exports it from here whenever you need your recovery copy.
